data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Default values' but failed to provide any concrete evidence or examples of default values being set for the custom fields. The linked use case outlines various field types but does not mention default values, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage. This lack of evidence directly leads to the conclusion that the requirement is not satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of default values being set for any custom fields.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
